# Notifications Requirements Checklist: Student Inbox Notifications

**Purpose**: Validate whether the feature requirements are complete, clear, consistent, and measurable before implementation/review.
**Created**: 2026-03-10
**Feature**: /home/m_srnic/ece493/group_project/ECE493Group19/specs/001-student-inbox-notifications/spec.md

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 Are requirements defined for all recipient targeting inputs (individual, roster, group) including required input fields and validation boundaries? [Completeness, Spec §FR-002, Spec §FR-003]
- [ ] CHK002 Are message content constraints fully specified with explicit maximum lengths for subject and body, not only that limits exist? [Gap, Clarity, Spec §FR-005]
- [ ] CHK003 Are requirements defined for the structure and minimum fields of per-recipient delivery status records? [Completeness, Spec §FR-008]
- [ ] CHK004 Are requirements explicit about what data must appear in the send completion summary beyond aggregate counts (for example, failed-recipient identifiers and reasons)? [Gap, Spec §FR-009]
- [ ] CHK005 Are failure-handling requirements complete when delivery status logging cannot be written, including administrator-visible outcome and remediation expectations? [Completeness, Spec §Edge Cases]

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK006 Is "valid recipient" defined with objective criteria for each targeting mode to avoid interpretation differences? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-003]
- [ ] CHK007 Is "guidance to correct the recipient list" specified with required content/format so reviewers can verify adequacy consistently? [Clarity, Spec §FR-006, Spec §SC-002]
- [ ] CHK008 Is "completion" in send confirmation clearly defined (queue accepted vs inbox persisted vs status finalized)? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-007, Spec §SC-001]
- [ ] CHK009 Are "predefined student group" and "active students" terms defined in the requirements or explicitly linked to authoritative source definitions? [Clarity, Spec §FR-002, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK010 Is "retry remains available for 24 hours" anchored to a single timezone/time-source rule to avoid inconsistent expiry behavior? [Clarity, Spec §FR-010, Spec §FR-011]

## Requirement Consistency

- [ ] CHK011 Do all-or-nothing authorization rules align consistently between narrative clarifications, FR-004, and FR-006 without allowing partial sends elsewhere? [Consistency, Spec §Clarifications, Spec §FR-004, Spec §FR-006]
- [ ] CHK012 Are duplicate-recipient rules consistent between edge-case text and completion-summary reporting requirements? [Consistency, Spec §Edge Cases, Spec §FR-009]
- [ ] CHK013 Do retry requirements consistently state whether retries are blocked when no failed recipients remain and whether this is an error or informational outcome? [Consistency, Spec §FR-011, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK014 Are retention requirements consistent across functional requirements and assumptions for all delivery/audit records that support accountability? [Consistency, Spec §FR-008, Spec §Assumptions]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [ ] CHK015 Can SC-001 be objectively validated as written, including definition of "valid notification sends" and measurement start/end points? [Measurability, Spec §SC-001]
- [ ] CHK016 Is SC-004 measurable with unambiguous sampling window, denominator definition, and treatment of delayed eventual consistency? [Measurability, Spec §SC-004]
- [ ] CHK017 Are acceptance scenarios mapped to pass/fail criteria that are explicit enough to avoid reviewer interpretation drift? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §User Scenarios & Testing]
- [ ] CHK018 Is a stable requirement-to-acceptance ID mapping scheme defined beyond artifact linkage so each FR/SC can be traced to validation evidence? [Traceability, Gap, Spec §FR-012]

## Scenario Coverage

- [ ] CHK019 Are primary-flow requirements complete from tool access through send confirmation, including preconditions and postconditions? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 1, Spec §FR-001..FR-009]
- [ ] CHK020 Are alternate-flow requirements complete for each recipient source type when one source resolves successfully and another fails within the same send request? [Coverage, Gap, Spec §FR-002, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK021 Are exception-flow requirements complete for authorization failure, invalid content, empty recipient set, and audit-log-write failure outcomes? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 2, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK022 Are recovery-flow requirements complete for partial-delivery retry, expired retry window, and no-op retry attempts? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 3, Spec §FR-010, Spec §FR-011, Spec §Edge Cases]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [ ] CHK023 Are requirements defined for concurrent sends that target overlapping recipients, including deduplication scope per request vs across requests? [Edge Case, Gap, Spec §FR-009]
- [ ] CHK024 Are requirements explicit for dependency unavailability (roster/group lookup or inbox subsystem outage), including expected send-state outcomes? [Dependency, Gap, Spec §Assumptions]
- [ ] CHK025 Are requirements explicit for permission changes occurring during long-running sends, including whether validation is single-point or re-checked before each delivery attempt? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases, Spec §FR-004]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [ ] CHK026 Are performance requirements specified for retry operations as well as initial sends, with measurable thresholds and recipient-scale limits? [Non-Functional, Gap, Spec §SC-001, Spec §SC-004]
- [ ] CHK027 Are security/privacy requirements specified for message content and delivery logs (access control, confidentiality, and retention disposal)? [Non-Functional, Gap, Spec §FR-008, Spec §Assumptions]
- [ ] CHK028 Are usability/accessibility requirements for administrator workflows explicitly specified (for example keyboard use and error-message comprehensibility)? [Non-Functional, Gap]
- [ ] CHK029 Are observability requirements defined for operational monitoring (alert thresholds, retry-failure reporting, audit completeness)? [Non-Functional, Gap, Spec §FR-008, Spec §SC-001]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [ ] CHK030 Are external dependency assumptions (student inbox availability, roster/group data quality, institutional policy limits) converted into testable requirements or explicit out-of-scope statements? [Assumption, Spec §Assumptions]
- [ ] CHK031 Are versioning and ownership requirements specified for upstream data sources that affect recipient resolution correctness? [Dependency, Gap, Spec §Assumptions]
- [ ] CHK032 Are requirements explicit about what happens when dependency contracts evolve (for example roster schema changes) during the 1-year log retention horizon? [Dependency, Gap, Spec §FR-008]

## Ambiguities & Conflicts

- [ ] CHK033 Is the term "unauthorized recipient" defined precisely enough to avoid conflicts between role policy, course membership, and group ownership rules? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-004]
- [ ] CHK034 Do any requirements conflict between "block the entire send when any unauthorized recipient exists" and duplicate-removal semantics in mixed valid/invalid sets? [Conflict, Spec §FR-004, Spec §FR-009]
- [ ] CHK035 Are unresolved assumptions explicitly listed with decision owners and due dates before implementation sign-off? [Ambiguity, Gap, Spec §Assumptions, Spec §FR-012]

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline.
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference.
